overview.name: Headers Negative
overview.description:
This scenario verifies error handling when required request headers are missing.
Test flow includes: 1. Send request with missing required header. 2. Verify response status = 400. 3. Validate error response body.
This scenario validates: - Missing request header handling - Proper validation error response - Error body consistency

http.comment: Step 1-3. Send request without one required header and verify error response
